targets.rawSql: SELECT to_char(start_time AT TIME ZONE '$timezone', 'FMMM/FMDD FMHH12:MI AM') as start_time FROM race;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN last_update = '1970-01-01 00:00:00' THEN '--/-- --:--'
        ELSE to_char(last_update AT TIME ZONE '$timezone', 'FMMM/FMDD FMHH12:MI AM')
    END AS last_update_display
FROM runners
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    FLOOR(average_moving_pace)::int || '''' || LPAD(ROUND((average_moving_pace - FLOOR(average_moving_pace)) * 60)::text, 2, '0') || '"' AS moving_pace_formatted
FROM runners
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
    FLOOR(average_overall_pace)::int || '''' || LPAD(ROUND((average_overall_pace - FLOOR(average_overall_pace)) * 60)::text, 2, '0') || '"' AS overall_pace_formatted
FROM runners
LIMIT 1;
SELECT mile_mark FROM runners LIMIT 1;
SELECT altitude FROM runners LIMIT 1;
SELECT course_deviation FROM runners LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pings;
SELECT COUNT(*) as position_report_pings FROM pings WHERE message_code = 'Position Report';

SELECT 
  COALESCE(
    100 * SUM(CASE WHEN gps_fix = '3D Fix' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
    / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0),
    0
  ) AS gps_fix_pct
FROM pings;

SELECT 
  name, 
  mile_mark, 
  gmaps_url, 
CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(
        NULLIF(arrival_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamptz),
        NULLIF(estimated_arrival_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamptz)
    ) IS NULL
    THEN '--/-- --:--'
    
    ELSE to_char(
        COALESCE(
            NULLIF(arrival_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamptz),
            NULLIF(estimated_arrival_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00+00'::timestamptz)
        ) AT TIME ZONE '$timezone',
        'FMMM/FMDD FMHH12:MI AM'
    )
END AS arrival_time,
  CASE 
    WHEN departure_time = '1970-01-01 00:00:00' THEN '--/-- --:--'
    ELSE to_char(departure_time AT TIME ZONE '$timezone', 'FMMM/FMDD FMHH12:MI AM')
  END AS departure_time,
  stoppage_time,
  is_passed, 
  comments 
FROM aidstations ORDER BY mile_mark;

SELECT 
  name, 
  mile_mark, 
  distance,
  gain,
  loss,
  estimated_duration,
  is_passed
FROM legs ORDER BY mile_mark;

SELECT
    (d.value)::float AS distance,
    (e.value)::float AS elevation
FROM race,
     jsonb_array_elements(distances) WITH ORDINALITY AS d(value, ordinality)
JOIN LATERAL
     jsonb_array_elements(elevations) WITH ORDINALITY AS e(value, ordinality)
     ON d.ordinality = e.ordinality;

SELECT
    name,
    mile_mark AS distance,
    altitude AS elevation
FROM aidstations;

SELECT
    name,
    mile_mark AS distance,
    altitude AS elevation
FROM runners
LIMIT 1;
